name: How to make Windows use its set language everywhere instead from
snippet:
I have my Windows 10 set to English but my region and date&time format to Czech. This makes apps and their names appear in Czech language ...
To work around the issue your only choice is to simply select a english speaking region, I recommend English UK since you're from europe.
